{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/111214557?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Dimpyj1604", "id": 111214557, "login": "Dimpyj1604", "node_id": "U_kgDOBqD_3Q", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dimpyj1604", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-46443", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:H/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "**Severity**: HIGH (CVSS ~7.5)
**Type**: CWE-200 (Exposure of Sensitive Information)
**File**: `packages/server/src/services/credentials/index.ts:62-71`

**Description**: When credentials are fetched with a `credentialName` filter parameter, the `encryptedData` field is NOT stripped from the response. The code properly omits `encryptedData` when NO filter is used (line 102) but fails to do so when a filter IS used (lines 62-63, 70-71).
Credential Data Leak
**Evidence**:
```typescript
// Lines 62-63: WITH filter - encryptedData LEAKED
const credentials = await appServer.AppDataSource.getRepository(Credential).findBy(searchOptions)
dbResponse.push(...credentials)  // encryptedData NOT removed!

// Lines 100-102: WITHOUT filter - encryptedData properly omitted
for (const credential of credentials) {
    dbResponse.push(omit(credential, ['encryptedData']))  // Correctly omitted
}
```

**Impact**: Authenticated users can extract encrypted credential data (API keys, passwords, tokens for services like OpenAI, AWS, etc.). Combined with access to the encryption key file (`~/.flowise/encryption.key` written with default permissions), this enables full credential theft.

**Reproduction**:
```bash
curl https://TARGET/api/v1/credentials?credentialName=openAIApi \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer API_KEY"
# Response includes encryptedData field with AES-encrypted credentials
```", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00271, "percentile": 0.18504}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7g73-99r4-m4mj", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-14T14:58:12Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7g73-99r4-m4mj", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7g73-99r4-m4mj"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46443"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-08T16:16:41Z", "published_at": "2026-05-14T14:58:12Z", "references": ["https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise/security/advisories/GHSA-7g73-99r4-m4mj", "https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise/releases/tag/flowise%403.1.2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46443", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7g73-99r4-m4mj"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/FlowiseAI/Flowise/security-advisories/GHSA-7g73-99r4-m4mj", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise", "summary": "FlowiseAI Vulnerable to Credential Data Leak", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T13:10:23Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7g73-99r4-m4mj", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.1.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "flowise"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.1.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: FlowiseAI Vulnerable to Credential Data Leak
